creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Wed Jan 16 13:37:59 2013
New Revision: 310491
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/310491

Log:
  - Update to 1.10 [1]
  - Pet portlint(1) by using space instead of tab in Makefile's header
  
  Changes:	http://piwik.org/changelog/
  PR:		ports/175335 [1]
  Submitted by:	Hans Fredrik Nordhaug <hans@nordhaug.priv.no> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/www/piwik/Makefile
  head/www/piwik/distinfo
  head/www/piwik/pkg-plist

Modified: head/www/piwik/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/www/piwik/Makefile	Wed Jan 16 13:20:59 2013	(r310490)
+++ head/www/piwik/Makefile	Wed Jan 16 13:37:59 2013	(r310491)
@@ -1,8 +1,8 @@
-# Created by:	Wen heping <wenheping@gmail.com>
+# Created by: Wen heping <wenheping@gmail.com>
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	piwik
-PORTVERSION=	1.9.2
+PORTVERSION=	1.10
 CATEGORIES=	www
 MASTER_SITES=	http://builds.piwik.org/
 

Modified: head/www/piwik/distinfo
==============================================================================
